title: Command Workspace First
summary: Moved the active lane workspace ahead of global command boards and made the detail panel lead at medium widths so direct Path Map links reach the selected lane without a long command-page scroll.
verification: python -m pytest E:\agent-company-lab\tests\test_agent_company_atlas_command_workspace_first.py -q failed before implementation because workspace appeared after system-relay-panel.
python -m pytest E:\agent-company-lab\tests\test_agent_company_atlas_command_workspace_first.py -q failed after the DOM move until responsive detail-panel order was added.

Browser runtime: command deck opened with workspace as first visible section, global command boards after it, detail panel leading the medium-width workspace, Path Mission Glance/Core Deck near the top, and overflow 0.
